## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential investment opportunity and understand GrowthX's business model and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX combines AI workflows with expert human oversight to deliver high-quality content and growth services](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Currently at \~$12M ARR, growing rapidly but intentionally constraining growth to focus on platform development](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Planning Series B raise in late summer/fall, potentially to fund acquisitions and expand into new verticals](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Unique value prop: replacing multiple tools/agencies with turnkey solution featuring top industry talent](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Technology

  - [Combines AI coding agents, expert oversight, and runtime layer for efficient workflow execution](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Serves as a "managed service" with dedicated teams (e.g., managing directors) for each client](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Pricing: $20-30K for initial 4-8 week strategy sprints, then $15-60K/month recurring revenue](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Cost-efficient: compute costs only 2% of revenue last month](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Focused on high-value, expert-level work (e.g., content creation, SEO, developer documentation)](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

### Growth and Financial Performance

  - [Started \~3 years ago, bootstrapped until Feb 2023 Series A](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Currently at \~$12M ARR, aiming to end year at $12M (intentionally constraining growth)](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Closed $1M ARR in one week recently after pausing sales for a month](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Not demand-constrained; being selective with clients and focusing on platform development](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### Future Plans and Series B

  - [Planning Series B raise in late summer/fall 2023](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Potential focus on acquisitions (e.g., e-commerce agencies) to expand capabilities and client base](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [Building out platform for broader release, seeing high demand from current demo audiences](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities in creating expert data and replacing various service industries](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

### Team and Expertise

  - [High-caliber team including ex-Apple, Shopify, TripAdvisor, HashiCorp executives and engineers](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Attracting talent that would be cost-prohibitive for most companies to hire directly](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to reach out in August to discuss potential Series B investment](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Marcel open to in-person meeting in San Francisco for next discussion](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Both parties to evaluate if round size and timing align with Summit Partners' investment criteria](https://fathom.video/share/SpCSd-PreH_UsB-_LEksKFe8nyHC9urg?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
